query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workspace_notes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  workspace_id INT NOT NULL,
  author VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'Demarcus',
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_ws_notes_workspace (workspace_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workspace_documents (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  workspace_id INT NOT NULL,
  file_name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  file_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  file_type VARCHAR(50),
  file_size INT,
  uploaded_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_ws_docs_workspace (workspace_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workspace_timeline (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  workspace_id INT NOT NULL,
  event VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  event_type VARCHAR(50),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_ws_timeline_workspace (workspace_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workspace_next_actions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  workspace_id INT NOT NULL,
  action VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  completed TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_ws_actions_workspace (workspace_id)
);

  workspace_id INT NOT NULL,
